title: Index cohort set #2 — GEO + EMBL-EBI (Expression Atlas / PRIDE)
context: NCBI GEO (Gene Expression Omnibus) and EMBL-EBI resources (Expression Atlas CC-BY-4.0, PRIDE open/commonly-CC0, ArrayExpress/BioStudies) host large sets of open cancer expression and proteomics datasets. GEO submitter-deposited data are generally reusable but must be verified per series for any stated restriction. Expression Atlas is CC-BY-4.0; PRIDE is commonly CC0 but varies per study. Each series/study is a distinct molecular-dataset entryType record (not patient-cohort). The cross-repository identity rule applies: if a GEO series is mirrored in Expression Atlas or BioStudies, it is one record with multiple hostingLocations[]. Each record requires gate-003 applied, per-series license verification, and fieldProvenance on every field. Depends on pilot-007 and triage-009.
objective: Index a set of open cancer-relevant GEO series and EMBL-EBI studies (Expression Atlas, PRIDE) as canonical records with per-series license verification, per-record gate artifacts, entryType correctly set (molecular-dataset or patient-cohort), cross-repository dedup applied, and fully cited fields — contributing ≥ 3 repositories to the M1 coverage target.
acceptanceCriteria: A set of open cancer-relevant GEO series and EMBL-EBI studies (Expression Atlas, PRIDE) are indexed with one canonical record per distinct dataset (deduped via identity rule when a series appears in multiple portals).
Each record has entryType: molecular-dataset (or patient-cohort where the resource is a cohort-level patient study) with aggregateCounts shape matching entryType.
Each record is gate-passed with a committed gates/<cohort-id>.json artifact recording access tier (OPEN), license id and rights booleans cited from primary source text, and PII check.
License verification is per-series (not assumed from the repository default): GEO submitter restrictions noted; Expression Atlas CC-BY-4.0 cited; PRIDE per-study terms verified.
Every record field has a fieldProvenance citation; completeness score ≥ 90/100.
Cancer types coded (OncoTree primary + NCIt/ICD-O-3 cross-refs) where applicable; oncology-data reviewer signs off.
License snapshots recorded; records pass schema validator and citation resolver; CI green; outputLicense CC-BY-4.0; DCO signed-off.
resources: Expression Atlas terms (CC-BY-4.0); PRIDE terms; ArrayExpress/BioStudies terms
output: Committed catalog records (catalog/*.json) for open cancer GEO series and EMBL-EBI studies with gate artifacts, fully cited, schema-valid, CI-green, licensed CC-BY-4.0.
